TimeEntry.Title: Re: New clients
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to User Machine, Checked non of the Antivirus installed on user Machine Except MalwareByte. scanned whole Computer with Malware Byte. NO  Virus detected,

TimeEntry.Title: New Computer Setup

TimeEntry.Title: TOM WITH RODDEL IS ON THE PHONE NEEDING SOME HELP WITH LAPTOP
TimeEntry.Notes: As per their request Tom, his laptop is not powering on. Tried to troubleshoot with him on call but no luck the only Dell logo is coming up and the laptop is getting hot. He stated that he will try af

TimeEntry.Title: Troubleshooting Tom's Laptop
TimeEntry.Notes: checking Tom's laptop, opening the back cover, and finding out the Fan's not working, will open a ticket with Dell Support and update this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop hardware repair.
TimeEntry.Notes: researching the bitlocker information and ways to over ride using GP editor. https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/security/information-protection/bitlocker/bitlocker-group-policy-settings#bkmk-de

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop hardware repair.
TimeEntry.Notes: Gathered information regarding the Service Call for Tom's laptop from RMG. Hardware is ordered and is shipped. entative delivery for tomorrow with a technician. Contacted Tom and let him know the curr

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop hardware repair.
TimeEntry.Notes: Called DELL Tech and verified visit for tomorrow to repair and replace the failing RAM on the laptop. Followed up with Tom as well and updated him on status.

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop hardware repair.
TimeEntry.Notes: Reached out to DELL technician regarding update on todays visit. should arrive between 11 30 and 12 30 PST.

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop hardware repair.
TimeEntry.Notes: Gave DELL tech the equipment and briefed him on the issue. after repairs completed by switching out the Mother Board, he asked to check it. Issue was BITLOCKER is activated and key was not available.

TimeEntry.Title: Troubleshooting Tom's Laptop
TimeEntry.Notes: Tome's laptop still has issue connecting to his mail box, setup his mailbox and he will be back tomorrow with the charger to finish the job

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop review and Outlook support
TimeEntry.Notes: Hamid asked me to review Toms laptop as he was not able to get his Roddelnhs.com or his VISTAGE email accounts connected. The india team was able to remove the VISTAGE email account and get his RODDEL

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Tom Roddel: Your GoDaddy Renewal Notice

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Thanks for creating your account and welcome to GoDaddy.
TimeEntry.Notes: Followed up with the user and then call GoDaddy to verify the account they have created for Tom. Setup a meeting tomorrow with the Tom again to renew the account.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Thanks for creating your account and welcome to GoDaddy.

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop/Iphone issue for Tom
TimeEntry.Notes: I received an email from Tom Riddle regarding his laptop issue. I logged into his computer and opened Outlook, where I found several spam emails. With Tom’s permission, I blocked the suspicio

TimeEntry.Title: Laptop/Iphone issue for Tom
TimeEntry.Notes: As per request from Rahul called Tom and confirmed with him his contacts were disappearing from his iPhone so guided him on how to sync them from iCloud and provided the steps but no luck then trouble

TimeEntry.Title: Got a call from Tom regarding the outlook issue
TimeEntry.Notes: Received a call from Tom regarding an Outlook issue on both his laptop and phone. I connected to his computer with his permission and asked him to log in with his password. After discussing the issue,

TimeEntry.Title: Install Missing Technijian Tools - RMG-LPT-TOM
TimeEntry.Notes: Upon reviewing the machine, I discovered that it was missing the latest security tools required for its optimal functioning. To proceed with resolving this, I immediately sent an email to Tom, seeking

TimeEntry.Title: Install Missing Technijian Tools - RMG-LPT-TOM
TimeEntry.Notes: As per the assigned task, I uninstalled the old version of CrowdStrike and installed the latest version on the computer.

TimeEntry.Title: Outbound mail flow stop.
TimeEntry.Notes: ChatGPT said:

TimeEntry.Title: Outbound mail flow stop.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Ticket Summary:
Reconnected with Tom to verify outbound mail flow. Sent a test email

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Huntress Critical Incident | CRITICAL - ISOLATED - Incident on RMG-LPT-TOM (Roddel Marketing Group, Inc.)
TimeEntry.Notes:
After receiving the alert, an email was sent to the user and the user was also contacted by phone to delete the file manually. The system was then released from isolation.

Connected to the system and removed all temporary files. Verified that the setup file had already been removed by the antivirus.

Performed a manual scan using CrowdStrike and initiated a manual full scan from the Huntress portal. The CrowdStrike scan has completed successfully, and the Huntress manual scan is still in progress. We are currently waiting for the scan to complete.

Tom Roddel  Contact no is 7143361666

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Huntress Critical Incident | CRITICAL - ISOLATED - Incident on RMG-LPT-TOM (Roddel Marketing Group, Inc.)
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per the handover, logged in to the Huntress and CrowdStrike portals to re-verify the system and confirmed that the manual scan was completed successfully.

A confirmation email has been sent to the user.
